nasb.text: For this, put on sackcloth, Lament and wail; For the fierce anger of the Lord Has not turned back from us.”

esv.text: For this put on sackcloth, lament and wail, for the fierce anger of the Lord has not turned back from us.”

cnv.text: 因此，你們應當披上麻布， 痛哭哀號， 因為耶和華的烈怒， 還沒有離開我們。

ccb.text: 为此，你们要腰束麻布， 嚎啕大哭， 因为耶和华向我们发的烈怒还没有止息。
